generated_oml:
instance LightingSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental monitoring sensor for lighting-related data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingSensor
]

instance LightingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time lighting data from environmental sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightingDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance HonoMiddlewareConfig : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Configuration data for Eclipse Hono middleware"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance DittoMiddlewareConfig : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Configuration data for Eclipse Ditto middleware"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM assets enriched with device metadata and middleware configurations for Eclipse Hono and Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT connectivity platform for sensor data ingestion and device management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin management platform for device state synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D visualization engine for interactive building representation"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance Revit : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM modeling tool for creating and enriching building information models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering methodologies for automated transformation and service evolution"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, EnergyOptimizationPredictiveAnalyticsService, VisualComfortPredictiveAnalyticsService, NonVisualHealthPredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for lighting adjustments in Building Control Systems"
]

instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller for HVAC regulation in Building Control Systems"
]

instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Living Lab building infrastructure in AECO domain for real-time monitoring and optimization"
    base:contains LightingSensor, LightingActuator, HVACController
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building environmental conditions and device states"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortAssessmentInsight, NonVisualHealthEffectsAnalysisInsight, AdjustLightingAction, RegulateHVACAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building operations using BIM model and real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortAssessmentInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationPredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight
]

instance VisualComfortPredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for visual comfort assessment"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortAssessmentInsight
]

instance NonVisualHealthPredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for non-visual health effects analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides NonVisualHealthEffectsAnalysisInsight
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building infrastructure using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortAssessmentInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insights for energy consumption optimization"
]

instance VisualComfortAssessmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time assessment of visual comfort based on environmental data"
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectsAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of non-visual health effects from environmental factors"
]

instance AdjustLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control command for lighting adjustments executed by Facility Managers"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance RegulateHVACAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control command for HVAC regulation executed by Facility Managers"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals transmitted from the DT to physical Building Control Systems (BCS) via Eclipse Hono and Ditto, enabling adjustments to lighting and other systems based on simulation and optimization results."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization between physical assets and the digital twin, with continuous data exchange for operational monitoring and control."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized hub integrating Eclipse Hono, Ditto, and Unreal Engine with modular service components, enabling bidirectional data exchange, visualization, and extensible service integration for comprehensive building management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the entire building life cycle, including design, construction, operation, and refurbishment phases, enabling continuous optimization throughout the building's life cycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to ensure interoperability, synchronization fidelity, and architectural soundness between physical and virtual representations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto protocols for secure, scalable real-time data exchange between physical assets and the Digital Twin."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Standardized interfaces for interoperability with external systems, enabling integration with facility management software and IoT platforms through modular service-oriented architecture."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards and standardized integration frameworks for interoperability in the AECO domain."
]
